name: TOTAL modes of transport
description: Default fallback when motCode is the all-modes aggregate. Held at 0.10 to match the legacy IMF default; tune via CIF_FOB_DEFAULT in app/config.py.

name: Air
description: Air freight on lightweight / high-value goods (electronics, pharmaceuticals). Range 15-30%; 20% is mid-range. Note: HS 71 (gold, precious metals) is air-freighted but the cost structure is dominated by insurance, not freight.

name: Water
description: Average across sea + inland waterway when the sub-mode is not reported.

name: Sea
description: Bulk and containerised sea freight. IMF DOTS / UNCTAD typical range 3-7%; 5% is the mid-range used by Ndikumana 2014/2016.

name: Inland waterway
description: Rivers / canals / lakes. Low-cost; comparable to rail.

name: Water, not elsewhere classified
description: Same default as the Water aggregate.

name: Land
description: Average across rail + road when the sub-mode is not reported.

name: Railway
description: Cross-border rail freight; low-cost on long inland hauls. 3-5% typical.

name: Road
description: Trucked freight; depends heavily on distance but 3-5% is the common cited band.

name: Land, not elsewhere classified
description: Same default as the Land aggregate.

name: Not elsewhere classified
description: Same as the all-modes default — mode unspecified.

name: Pipelines and cables
description: Pipelines and electrical grid. Almost no marginal freight cost — primarily metering and insurance.

name: Pipelines and cables, not elsewhere classified
Postal consignments, mail or courier shipments
description: Postal parcels — small high-value goods. 10-20% range; 15% midpoint.

name: Self-propelled goods
description: Vehicles or vessels moving under their own power across the border. ~5% covers fuel + crew amortisation.

name: Other
description: Mode unknown / not specified; falls back to the all-modes default.
